results.rendered_html: candra—gupta m. ‘moon-protected’, N. of a renowned king (Σανδρο-κυπτος or Σανδρο-κοττος reigning at Pāṭali-putra about 315 B.C. as the founder of a new dynasty; installed by the Brāhman Cāṇakya after causing the death of Nanda),  Inscr. ;  Pāṇ. i, 1, 68 , Vārtt. 7,  Pat. ;  BhP. xii, 1, 12 ;  Kathās. ;  Mudr.

results.rendered_html: candragupta (ca˚ + gupta) m. N. pr. eines berühmten Königs, des Σανδροϰυπτος der Griechen,  LIA. I, 501 . 749 . II, 62 . 196. fgg.   KATHĀS. 4,116 . 5,123 .  VP. 468 .  MUDRĀR. 3,13  u. s. w. — N. pr. zweier Könige aus der Gupta — Dynastie  LIA. II, 944. fgg.  961. fgg.  — the registrar of Yamaʼs (yama) court  WILS. ; falsche Form für citragupta.
